[[General/Legends|General]] '''Afren Hul''' was the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Governor/Legends|governor]] of [[Derilyn]]. In lieu of a typical Imperial [[Moff/Legends|Moff]], Afren Hul ran the majority of affairs in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]]. Considered to be a brutal and sadistic dictator, he ruled Derilyn with pure military force.
